title: athyrium americanum
intro: Athyrium americanum, also known as American Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Athyrium americanum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
